candidate_definition_hints.text: Video Feature Extraction Code for EMNLP 2020 paper "HERO: Hierarchical Encoder for Video+Language Omni-representation Pre-training"
This repo aims at providing feature extraction code for video data in [HERO Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.00200) (EMNLP 2020).
